case_title: CATHOLIC MUTUAL GROUP VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASS TORT, COMPLAINT COORDINATION PROCEEDING JCCP 4955 / SPECIAL TITLE (CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.550) - CALIFORNIA NORTH BAY FIRES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHOLIC MUTUAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY PG&E CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-26-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-25-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-03-2019 COMPLEX LITIGATION ASSIGNMENT REQUESTED BY FILING PARTIES; FEE INCLUDED IN FILING FEE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-26-2019 CONTINUED TO JUL-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE: BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100073914) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHOLIC MUTUAL GROUP
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE: BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-07-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY (TRANSACTION ID # 100074719) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHOLIC MUTUAL GROUP
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-06-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-07-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100122309)
